_note: MCC example policy. Defaults to read_only. To enable file writing, change permissions.mode to 'read_write' and add specific directories to permissions.write_allow_paths (e.g. 'C:\\MyProject'). The Lite edition only auto-creates this file with these fields; additional fields like 'sqlite_mcp', 'gemini_cli', 'github_mcp', 'git' or 'at_mention' are reserved for future MCC editions and are silently ignored by Lite.
